positive: An elegant, stylized cosmic scene composition featuring a highly detailed, bioluminescent jellyfish constellation suspended among abstract nebulae and shooting star trails. The jellyfish should have clean, flowing, trumpet-like silhouettes, illuminated by cool cyan, deep violet, and ethereal teal glows. The background nebula should showcase swirling cosmic dust and deep space mystery. Center composition, minimalist yet dramatic, designed for high contrast print on fabric. Clean lines, vector-graphic feel, rendered with a blend of hyperrealism and abstract art. Studio lighting, dramatic backlighting, 8K quality, poster print art.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, signature, logos, trademarks
